name: yuque1
description: 复刻语雀：可自托管知识库（企业级前后端）

scripts.check:node: node -e "const m=+process.versions.node.split('.')[0]; if(m!==22){console.error('Require Node.js 22, got',process.version); process.exit(1)}; console.log('Node',process.version)"
scripts.ci: pnpm run check:node && pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
